---
title: "Publications"
execute:
  freeze: false
  echo: false
---

For a complete list see our [Google Scholar page](https://scholar.google.com/) or individual [ORCID profiles](https://orcid.org/).

---

```{python}
import json
import os
import re
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import HTML

project_root = Path(os.environ.get("QUARTO_PROJECT_DIR", Path.cwd()))
pub_file = project_root / "data" / "publications.json"

if not pub_file.exists():
    display(HTML(
        '<div class="callout callout-warning"><p>No publications data found. '
        'Run <code>python scripts/fetch_publications.py</code> to populate '
        '<code>data/publications.json</code>, then re-render this page.</p></div>'
    ))
else:
    publications = json.loads(pub_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

    # Build set of lowercase team member name strings from team profile titles.
    # Used as fallback when CrossRef does not supply per-author ORCIDs.
    def _load_group_names():
        names = set()
        team_dir = project_root / "team"
        for path in team_dir.glob("*.qmd"):
            if path.name == "index.qmd":
                continue
            text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
            m = re.search(r'^title:\s*["\']?(.+?)["\']?\s*$', text, re.MULTILINE)
            if m:
                names.add(m.group(1).strip().lower())
        return names

    group_names = _load_group_names()

    def _is_group_member(author_name, author_orcid, group_orcids_set):
        # Primary: ORCID match (requires re-running the fetch script)
        if author_orcid and author_orcid in group_orcids_set:
            return True
        # Fallback: all tokens of a group member name must appear in the author name tokens
        author_tokens = set(author_name.lower().split())
        return any(set(gn.split()).issubset(author_tokens) for gn in group_names)

    def format_authors(authors, author_orcids, group_orcids):
        group_set = set(group_orcids or [])
        orcids = author_orcids or [None] * len(authors)
        labelled = []
        for name, orcid in zip(authors, orcids):
            if _is_group_member(name, orcid, group_set):
                labelled.append(f"<strong>{name}</strong>")
            else:
                labelled.append(name)
        if len(labelled) <= 6:
            return ", ".join(labelled)
        return ", ".join(labelled[:6]) + " et al."

    def format_location(pub):
        parts = []
        if pub.get("volume"):
            loc = pub["volume"]
            if pub.get("issue"):
                loc += f"({pub['issue']})"
            parts.append(loc)
        if pub.get("pages"):
            parts.append(pub["pages"])
        return ":".join(parts)

    by_year = {}
    for pub in publications:
        year = pub.get("year") or 0
        by_year.setdefault(year, []).append(pub)

    lines = [f"<p><strong>{len(publications)}</strong> publications from CompOmics group members.</p>"]

    for year in sorted(by_year.keys(), reverse=True):
        lines.append(f'<h2 id="y{year}">{year if year else "Unknown year"}</h2>')
        lines.append('<ol class="pub-list">')
        for pub in by_year[year]:
            title = pub.get("title", "Untitled")
            doi = pub.get("doi", "")
            journal = pub.get("journal", "")
            authors_str = format_authors(
                pub.get("authors", []),
                pub.get("author_orcids", []),
                pub.get("group_orcids", []),
            )
            location = format_location(pub)

            title_html = (
                f'<a href="https://doi.org/{doi}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">{title}</a>'
                if doi else title
            )
            journal_html = f"<em>{journal}</em>" if journal else ""
            meta_parts = [p for p in [journal_html, location] if p]
            meta_html = ", ".join(meta_parts) + "." if meta_parts else ""

            lines.append(
                f'<li class="pub-entry">'
                f'<span class="pub-authors">{authors_str}.</span> '
                f'<span class="pub-title">{title_html}.</span>'
                + (f' <span class="pub-meta">{meta_html}</span>' if meta_html else "")
                + "</li>"
            )
        lines.append("</ol>")

    display(HTML("\n".join(lines)))
```
